caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio against a backdrop of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears large black headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Sloppy Joe's". A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him, with the text "Shock Mount" visible on the hardware. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expression shifts slightly as he looks toward something off-camera to his left. His mouth opens and closes in the process of talking, and his gaze flickers between fixed points. Tattoos are visible on his right arm, which rests near the microphone stand. The camera angle remains static, focusing on a medium close-up of the man as he interacts with an unseen participant or host.
